ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apps" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the app */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the app */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the app */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the app */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the app (e.g., 19M) */,
  "installs" TEXT /* Number of installs (e.g., 10,000+) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the app (e.g., Free, Paid) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the app */,
  "content_rating_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content rating of the app */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer of the app */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the app was updated */,
  "privacy_policy_url" TEXT /* URL to the app's privacy policy */,
  "terms_of_service_url" TEXT /* URL to the app's terms of service */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Email for user support */,
  "support_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for user support */,
  "app_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for app search and categorization */,
  "app_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the app */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the app's icon */,
  "screenshot_urls" TEXT /* URLs to the app's screenshots (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_content_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_rating_id") REFERENCES content_ratings ("content_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the category icon */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "content_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the content rating (e.g., Everyone, Teen) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content rating */,
  "age_recommendation" TEXT /* Recommended age range for the content */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the content rating icon */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the content rating is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the developer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the developer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company (if applicable) */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL to the company's website */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "company_icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the company's icon */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the developer account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the app */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "is_major_update" INTEGER /* Whether the version is a major update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., app store, external site) */,
  "review_version" TEXT /* Version of the app the review is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_reviews_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, user, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the app store */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or short description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_installs" (
  "install_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installation */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who installed the app */,
  "install_date" TEXT /* Date the app was installed */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device on which the app was installed */,
  "install_status" TEXT /* Status of the installation (e.g., active, uninstalled) */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Date the app was last used */,
  "install_source" TEXT /* Source of the installation (e.g., app store, direct download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("install_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_installs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_installs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., purchase, in-app purchase) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_transactions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "promotion_status" TEXT /* Status of the promotion (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, bundle) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion (e.g., new users, existing users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the app */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was recorded */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., app store, external site) */,
  "rating_status" TEXT /* Status of the rating (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_ratings_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., app store, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "total_installs" INTEGER /* Total number of installs */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated */,
  "daily_active_users" INTEGER /* Number of daily active users */,
  "monthly_active_users" INTEGER /* Number of monthly active users */,
  "average_session_duration" REAL /* Average session duration in minutes */,
  "user_retention_rate" REAL /* User retention rate */,
  "churn_rate" REAL /* Churn rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the statistics were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_statistics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the role is the default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the role assignment (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
